sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id Int64, timestamp_value Int64, timezone String);
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp_value * 1000, timezone) AS converted_time, toTypeName(converted_time) FROM test_timestamps WHERE timestamp_value > 0;
SELECT id, timestamp_value, fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp_value * 1000, 'UTC') AS utc_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_timestamps WHERE timestamp_value < 5000);
SELECT num_value, fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(num_value * 1000000) AS nano_time FROM large_numbers HAVING nano_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count, fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(SUM(timestamp_value), timezone) AS sum_time FROM test_timestamps GROUP BY id HAVING count > 1;
CREATE TABLE mixed_types (id Int64, value String);
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(CAST(value AS Int64), 'UTC') AS converted_time FROM mixed_types WHERE CAST(value AS Int64) > 0;
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(1234567891, timezone) * 2 AS doubled_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE timezone IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(NULLIF(timestamp_value, 0), 'UTC') AS safe_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE timestamp_value <> 0;
